results.releaseNotes: - Another day has passed and I still haven’t used the Pythagorean theorem
results.description:
Timehop is the only app that lets you celebrate all your best memories, every day. Join millions of people who start their day reminiscing with friends on a nostalgic journey. It's like #tbt every day!

---

Webby Awards Best Social App

Webby Awards People’s Voice - Best Social App

As featured in The New York Times, Washington Post, Time Magazine, and Vox.

---

Your Daily Memories

• See this exact day in history, every time you open
• Tap or Swipe through every old photo, video, and post
• Relive your favorite vacations, parties, and weddings
• Go back 1 year ago, to 20 years ago, and beyond!

All Your Memories

• Relive every photo you’ve taken, even the ones you never post
• Catch every video a second time from your camera roll
• Connect your Facebook, Google Photos, Dropbox, Flickr, Tumblr, and Swarm accounts to see your entire social history

Relive the Best, Hide the Rest!

• Cherish the best memories and protect yourself from the sad ones
• Hide your bad memories so you don’t see them again next year
• Go directly to the posts and delete them from where they were originally posted

Then & Now

• Compare the old with the new!
• Snap a new selfie to show off just how much your hair has changed
• Or grab a recent photo of your puppy to see how much they’ve grown

Reminisce with Friends

• Share any memory easily with your friends via sms or other messaging platforms
• Post your best throwbacks and share the memories with everyone
• Crop, frame, and add stickers like a scrapbooking master

Your Daily Habit

• Every morning you get a new day of Timehop memories, and it only lasts for 24 hours!
• Set alerts so you never miss a day
• Your Timehop streak tracks how many days in a row you have checked your memories
• Unlock badges and rewards the bigger your streak gets!

Nostalgic News

• Watch Abe, our dinosaur mascot, report on the news of the past
• Learn about the weird, lesser-known, and culturally significant historic moments
• It’s a fun nostalgic fact every day

RetroVideo

• Don’t miss an episode of the best pop-culture nostalgia TV show
• Catch clips of the movies, shows, and music memories on this day in a bitesize format
• Impress your friends with just how much you remember from your childhood

---
Subscription Details:
• Monthly and annual plans are available
• Try Timehop+ with a 7-day free trial when you choose an annual plan
• Payment will be charged to your Apple account
• Your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period
• Your subscription can be managed and the auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your settings in the App Store after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial, if offered, will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription to that service


Privacy Policy: https://www.timehop.com/privacy
Terms of Service: https://www.timehop.com/terms
—


Wanna know more? Find us on Instagram and Facebook @Timehop, visit timehop.com, or contact us at help@timehop.com.

Happy Timehopping!
